_comment: Main agent configuration for the Fabric DW Telemetry Agent. Replace all placeholder values before deploying.

agent.name: Fabric DW Data Recovery & GC Telemetry Agent
agent.description: Queries Kusto telemetry, analyzes Fabric Data Warehouse recovery features, generates daily executive summaries, and sends automated emails.

ai_model._comment: AI model configuration for summary and email generation.

features._comment: Toggle individual recovery feature telemetry queries on/off.

retention._comment: Configurable retention period settings (valid range: 1–120 days).

customer_mapping._comment: Path to the workspace GUID → customer name mapping file.
